title: Cyclophorus giesenhagenii

It belongs to the genus Cyclophorus and the family Cyclophoridae. The snail is classified under the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Stylommatophora. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
